raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Series of first-person affirmations declaring a shift toward ease, simplicity, and non-resistance",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Ease does not require earning",
    "Effort is sometimes generated by habit rather than necessity",
    "Things are sometimes already simple",
    "Rest, clarity, and flow are currently being justified or earned",
    "Resistance to life is present and can be released"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent; all lines reinforce a unified theme of reducing self-imposed effort and allowing flow",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker experiences unnecessary stress from habitual over-effort and the affirmations support a beneficial mindset shift toward presence and acceptance",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statements are interpreted as endorsing passivity or avoidance of required action rather than selective release of unnecessary effort"
}
